title: Car Radio Removal Tool Key DIN Release Compatible with Opel Adam, Antara, Astra, Agila, Corsa, Insignia, Omega, Tigra, Vectra, Zafira, Meriva, Mokka, Vivar Head Unit CD Player Pins Stereo Tools 2pcs
features: The keys tools are easy to use and will save you a lot of time and money by allowing you to do it yourself! Just insert key tool into the right and left side factory holes and pull release radio out. Detailed instructions in description below.

Perfect Fit: If your car stereo has two round holes appx. 8cm apart at both it will work. Works with any vehicle such as Hatchback, Sedan, Saloon, Estate, 4x4 Jeeps, MPV And SUV Models. Fits Year: 2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016. Full model list in description below
These fascia adapter keys are made from thick metal in order to ensure they won’t bend or break in the middle of a job if used properly
These stereo removal tools come in a pack of 2. Measurements: 8cm x 8cm. Thickness 3mm. Material: Nickel plated steel

Universal compatibility: Fits all stereos which has 2 holes on each side including Opel: Adam, Antara, Astra, Agila, Corsa, Insignia, Omega, Tigra, Vectra, Zafira, Meriva, Mokka, Vivaro. Including radios: CDR2004 CDR2005 CC20 CD30 CD40 CD50 CD70
